title: Breakfast!
description: A simple mod adding some easy foods to have for breakfast.
body: # Breakfast! for Fabric Everyone knows breakfast is the most important meal of the day. But in Minecraft, the selection of foods to eat for breakfast is sadly limited. This mod aims to fix that! **Breakfast! requires [Fabric Loader](https://github.com/FabricMC/fabric-loader) and [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)** ---------- ### About Breakfast!: Breakfast! is my first mod made on the Fabric mod loader. It came about while I was playing in Survival, eating bread, when I realized how disappointing it was to just be eating bread. I yearned for toast, for eggs, for jam, for proper food, and thus, Breakfast! was born. The goal of Breakfast! was to familiarize myself with the Fabric toolchain, and to create a Vanilla-ish food mod, which I've not yet seen made for Fabric. ---------- ### Features: * Toast (Restores 7 Hunger Points) * Butter (Restores 1 Hunger Point, Eaten Quickly!) * Fried Egg (Restores 4 Hunger Points) * Jam (Restores 3 Hunger Points, Cures Poison!) * Toast with Egg (Restores 11 Hunger Points) * Toast with Butter (Restores 8 Hunger Points) * Toast with Jam (Restores 10 Hunger Points) * Jam Sandwich (Restores 17 Hunger Points) * Fresh Milk (Cures All Effects!)
